dataset_name: Physical Health Checks for People with Severe Mental Illness

hints.entry_structure: Entry page links to quarterly publication subpages (Qx-YYYY-YY).
hints.publication_date: Publication date appears on each subpage header and on the entry page beneath each sublink.
hints.subject_period: Subject period is quarterly and appears in link text (for example Q4 2025-26).

samples.notes: Quarterly CSV file; one CSV per quarterly publication subpage.

targets.preferred_text_filter: Physical Health Checks for Severe Mental Illness

hints.file_pattern: Physical Health Checks for Severe Mental Illness, Q<quarter> <YYYY>-<YY> CSV.csv
hints.month_extraction: Extract quarter and fiscal year from link text
